model.label: MiMo-V2-Pro
model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Houston's elite defensive efficiency (rank 4) is the critical factor against Florida's potent offense (rank 9-11). While Florida has slightly higher overall KenPom/Torvik rankings (4 vs 5), Houston's ability to control tempo and force difficult shots should limit the Gators' scoring opportunities. The Cougars' tournament experience under Kelvin Sampson and their balanced profile give them a slight edge in this classic offense vs. defense matchup, especially with the game being played in Houston at Toyota Center.

reasoningStep.title: Elite 8 South Regional Final: Florida vs Houston
reasoningStep.summary: Extremely close matchup between two elite teams with nearly identical analytical profiles. Florida holds a slight edge in overall rankings (KenPom/Torvik #4 vs #5), but Houston's defensive prowess and home-court advantage in Houston provide counterbalance.
evidence: Florida: KenPom rank 4, Torvik rank 4, 26-7 record, offensive efficiency rank 9-11, defensive efficiency rank 5
Houston: KenPom rank 5, Torvik rank 5, 28-5 record, offensive efficiency rank 13-16, defensive efficiency rank 4
Houston's elite defense (rank 4) vs Florida's elite offense (rank 9-11) creates classic matchup dynamic
Game played at Toyota Center in Houston, providing Cougars with significant home-court advantage
Both teams have tournament experience - Florida as reigning national champion, Houston under Kelvin Sampson
Prior picks show Houston defeated Illinois (nation's #1 offense) in Sweet 16, demonstrating ability to contain elite offenses

You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
